sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Dopamine EDP | Hot. Magnetic. Addictive.

Turn up the mood with Dopamine — a close and attractive fragrance made for unforgettable moments. Bold, warm, and slightly spicy, this scent leaves a smooth trail that feels sensual without being too strong.

Made for special moments and confident energy, Dopamine blends warmth and softness in perfect balance. It’s ideal for date nights, evening outings, and formal events where you want to make a strong impression. Powerful yet smooth, it fits perfectly from candlelight dinners to stylish parties.

This Eau De Parfum is long-lasting, rich, and truly captivating.

For nights full of chemistry. For moments you won’t forget.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
• Fragrance Profile – Long-lasting bold scent crafted to make a strong impression.

• High Concentration Formula – Premium perfume blend designed for enhanced longevity.

• Ethical Composition – Vegan and cruelty-free formulation for conscious use.

• Clean & Safe Formula – Free from parabens and sulphates for a better experience.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
Top- Floral, Amber

Middle- Rose

Base- Vetiver, Patchouli, Cypriol

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Mood Enhancer – Uplifts your energy and keeps you feeling positive.

• Attractive Aura – Creates a magnetic and captivating presence.

• Confidence Booster – Helps you feel bold, fearless, and self-assured.

• Passion Igniter – Inspires motivation and inner drive.

• Warm & Powerful Vibe – Surrounds you with a rich, energetic essence.

• Statement Fragrance – Makes you stand out effortlessly.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Gently roll the perfume on pulse points – wrists, neck, and behind ears.

Apply directly on clean, dry skin for best results.

Reapply anytime for a refreshing boost of fragrance.

Perfect to carry in your bag for on-the-go elegance. ✨
